## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Breaking changes
<!-- If checked above, describe what breaks and how users should migrate -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (lint + format)
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] README updated if public API changed
